highlights.title: BYD Rejects Claims It Violated Hungary’s Environmental Rules
highlights.description: Chinese electric vehicle maker BYD Co. said it rejected allegations it breached environmental rules in Hungary during the construction of its first plant in the European Union.

highlights.title: Hackers Claim to Leak Stolen Madison Square Garden Data
highlights.description: Plus: Gay bars in San Francisco using face scanners, France quits Palantir, Apple plans to change its private email and more.
